# Feature: Fast-Mode Init with Subagent-Distributed Lazy Scaffolding

> Feature ID: FEAT-003
> Status: 🔧 implemented
> Created: 2026-04-17T00:00:00Z

## Description

/forge:init --fast completes in ~30s by deferring heavy LLM generation (personas, skills, templates, workflows) to first use. Each workflow stub self-materialises its transitive dependency closure on first invocation.

## Requirements

- /forge:init --fast skips phases 4, 5, 6, 8; writes KB skeleton; writes stub workflow files
- All 17 meta-workflows have machine-readable deps: frontmatter compiled into edges.workflows in structure-manifest.json
- ensure-ready.cjs: exit 0 = closure ready, exit 1 = needs generation; exports computeClosure and resolveKbPath
- lazy-materialize.md: BFS transitive closure, KB → personas → skills/templates → workflows
- /forge:materialize command for explicit warm-up without overwriting pristine artifacts
- Per-file skills/templates scoping in /forge:regenerate
- mode field in .forge/config.json (fast | full)
